prompt: Texture, draw structure, and secondary cues all agree on a clean dry-board pressure story. Choose the best action.
why_v1: When all cues align on a dry board, the clean texture story should lead to a raise.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. The dry synthesis read supports a raise.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. Start from the full dry-board synthesis: when texture, draw structure, and secondary cues all stay clean, the line should convert that clarity into a raise.
